overview: Full-stack company website and CRM dashboard for BIG BUCKS INNOVATION PVT LTD — featuring an animated public marketing site, a Bosch-style mega menu, and a complete authenticated CRM for managing leads, clients, projects, and tasks.
features: Animated landing page with glowing hero (CSS/Framer Motion)
Mega menu navbar across all public pages
Products, About, Careers (job board), and Contact pages
Internet Identity authentication with protected dashboard
CRM dashboard: Leads, Clients, Projects, Tasks management
Reports page with charts and pipeline visualization
